records.tldr: The customer set up a new account with successful API integration adding users to their "Radud Leads" list. However, the automated Flow triggered by this list is not sending emails, despite being set to "Live." The customer inquires whether sending is paused due to a pending manual account review or if another issue is blocking the Flow
They are wondering why an specific profile that's on the list (CCUFSA 2026) receives an email even though the list they're in isn't part of the audience of a campaign they receive on July 7, 2026.
The customer wants to segment the profiles that did not set their country and profiles who lived in Osaka

cx link button directs them to homepage instead of checkout page

Although the profile is added immediately to the "Citas & Contacto T57" list upon form submission, the email delivery is significantly delayed. The flow is live, with no configured delays, Smart Sending is disabled, and the sending domain is verified and active. The customer requests investigation into the cause of the sending queue delay and needs the email to be delivered within 5 minutes of list addition.

reports that the Klaviyo Onsite.js script (~1 MB) significantly impacts their mobile page speed, increasing Total Blocking Time and unused JavaScript per Google PageSpeed Insights. They rely on Klaviyo features like forms, onsite tracking, and back-in-stock notifications and do not want to remove the script but seek ways to reduce its performance impact.

he customer accepted an invitation to join New Harbinger's author email account but did not log out of their browser initially, causing an error. After requesting a re-sent invitation and accepting it again, the account still does not appear under their accounts despite receiving a confirmation pop-up. The customer is seeking clarification on whether the issue is on their end or a broader problem.

The customer is building a Shopify Placed Order flow and wants to display only products tagged "preorder" within an order that may contain multiple products. They need to dynamically show product image, title, and variant only for items with the "preorder" tag. The challenge is that Klaviyo's dynamic variables use fixed indexes (e.g., event.line_items.0), preventing filtering by product tags. The customer has tried dynamic tables, content repeat, show/hide logic, and Liquid loops without success.

Customer accidentally deleted an imported list. Since the then the imported profiles from the list no longer appear to any of their list or segments. And the overall audience count is still significantly higher than it should be but those profile is still included in the total audience number. They want to know how they can remove contacts from the total audience they still being included. They confirmed that he deleted list on June 24 was named Bella's Rewards Imports.
